cards.title: Risk 1–2%
cards.body: Max loss per trade = 1–2% of equity. On ~$3.9k that’s ~$40–$80 to the stop — not “bet the farm” on margin.

cards.title: Survive the clusters
cards.body: Even a 50% system gets 3 losers in a row often. First job is stay alive through the bad run — not avenge it.

cards.title: Wins can kill you
cards.body: After 1–3 winners you feel invincible and size up. That’s when most blow up — not only after losers.

cards.title: Your edge band
cards.body: SOXL / SOXS · hold 15–60m (same-day runner OK). Sub-15m scalps and random overnight names are off-plan.

cards.title: No trade is a trade
cards.body: Weekly deposits + selective entries compound. Forcing day-trade volume is what cooks you.

cards.title: Office mode
cards.body: Apartment = desk only. No sleep. In = market. Flat = leave. Bed is not the trading floor.
